description: Free public real estate listing exchange. Search, retrieve, and submit inquiries on listings.
name: com.trellistate/listings

headers.description: Bearer ope_xxx — required only for the submit_inquiry tool. Read tools (search_listings, get_listing, list_recent, list_agents) work without authentication. Register a free agent key at https://trellistate.com/api/v1/agents/register.
headers.name: Authorization

title: Trellistate
